FeatureStatus.description:
Lifecycle status of a product feature.

Covers the full path from idea to retirement. Authors pick one value that
best reflects the current state; no implicit ordering is enforced.

oneOf.description: Idea captured, not yet committed to a roadmap.
Committed to a roadmap, not yet started.
Build complete, awaiting review or QA sign-off.
Released to production but not yet generally available.
Work halted by an unresolved dependency or decision.

PathRef.description:
Path-based cross-reference relative to .corpospec/ root.
Pattern: `^[a-z0-9_-]+(/[a-z0-9_.-]+)+$`

ProductFeatureCustom.description:
Typed extension fields for ProductFeature.

Empty scaffold mirroring `FeatureMatrixCustom`. Add typed fields here as
feature-specific custom data emerges. Unknown keys are preserved via the
untyped `extra` bag and can be promoted to typed fields later.

extra.description:
Free-form extension bag. Keys are custom field names, values are
arbitrary JSON. Promote frequently-used keys to typed fields on this
struct and remove them from the bag.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the feature (proposed through sunset).
